recentAddition: ADALINE (An Adaptive 'Adaline' Neuron Using Chemical 'Memistors') - Widrow & Hoff, Stanford 1960: The first gradient-based neural learning algorithm. Introduced the LMS (Least Mean Squares) rule and the Delta Rule, establishing the mathematical foundation for modern deep learning optimization. Every SGD-based trainer traces its lineage to this 1960 breakthrough.
